name: David's Friendly Market Liquor & Check Cashing
description_short: David's Friendly Market Liquor & Check Cashing offers check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment services at 543 32nd St, San Diego, with extended hours daily.
description_long:
David's Friendly Market Liquor & Check Cashing is a neighborhood financial services provider located in San Diego's 92102 zip code. The business operates as a combination liquor market and check-cashing service, serving the local community with traditional transaction services. Based on the available information from their Waze listing, the company positions itself as a convenient, accessible financial services point for residents needing cash access and payment processing.

The company offers core check-cashing services along with money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment capabilities. These services are designed to serve unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to funds or payment processing without maintaining a traditional bank account. The extended operating hours—opening at 7:00 AM daily and staying open until midnight or later on weekends—indicate an attempt to provide accessibility during extended windows.

The integration of liquor retail with check-cashing services is characteristic of neighborhood convenience-based financial service providers. The business uses a straightforward operational model with a single location and appears to serve walk-in customers seeking immediate transaction processing. The contact information (619-236-1580) and website reference (sudsandspirits.com) suggest basic digital presence typical of small independent operators in this sector.

Prospective customers should note that check-cashing services typically charge fees per transaction, which are not disclosed in available information. The company's specific fee structure, accepted identification requirements, check limits, and exact service terms are not documented in the source material. As with most check-cashing services, consumers should verify all fees and terms before conducting transactions.
pros: Extended operating hours: Open 7:00 AM to midnight on weekdays and until 1:00 AM Friday-Saturday
Sunday availability: Open Sundays 7:00 AM to 10:00 PM for check cashing and other services
Multiple services offered: Check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment in one location
Neighborhood accessibility: Located at 543 32nd St with direct phone line (619) 236-1580
Consistent daily availability: Open seven days a week with reliable posted hours
Convenient geographic location: Situated in accessible San Diego neighborhood (32.711, -117.127)
cons: Fee structure not disclosed: No information provided about check cashing fees, transaction limits, or service charges
Limited online presence: Website is redirected to sudsandspirits.com with minimal information about financial services offerings
Single location only: No indication of multiple branches or alternative service access points
No digital services mentioned: No evidence of online check cashing, mobile app, or remote services
Liquor retail focus may overshadow services: Primary business appears to be liquor sales with financial services secondary
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked San Diego residents needing same-day check cashing
Customers requiring evening or weekend check cashing services in the 92102 area
Individuals needing wire transfers or money orders without a traditional bank account
diagnosis: David's Friendly Market Liquor & Check Cashing is best suited for unbanked San Diego residents needing quick check cashing, money orders, or wire transfers during extended hours, particularly in evenings and weekends. The critical caveat is that actual fee structures, check limits, and service terms are not publicly documented, requiring direct contact before conducting transactions.
